title: Software Developer
description: Developing an agriculture-oriented SaaS Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) application for agricultural startups and mid-size companies to streamline business processes
Pipeline products include cloud-based ERP Application and cross-platform (iOS & Android) native mobile applications
ERP features include a customisable Dashboard, built-in CRM, Kanban Ticket Manager, Labour Management, Budget Manager, Inventory Management, Vendor Finder and region-based Scheme Finder
Collaborating with potential clients to develop Poultry, Fishery and Animal Husbandry dashboards and features for the complete ERP application

title: Software Developer
description: Core contributor to the development of ComPro, a centralized compliance monitoring platform featuring a user-friendly interface tailored for staffing providers across the DACH region.
Architected a standardized UI component library using Storybook, streamlining the development lifecycle for the Pactos product suite and ensuring 100% design-to-code consistency.
Engineered high-performance optimizations post-v1 launch, achieving a 99.8% reduction in API response times (from 12s to 20ms) and significantly decreasing Payload CMS load times.
Optimized operational overhead by designing a sophisticated caching and data-fetching strategy for the NorthData API, resulting in a measurable reduction in third-party integration costs.
Ensured platform reliability by resolving mission-critical production bottlenecks and managing seamless deployments across multi-tier (Test, Staging, Production) environments under tight deadlines

title: Frontend Developer
description: Developed a fantasy gaming web application with SvelteKit and Tailwind; created components, functionalities and integrated API endpoints
Developed core features for the application like dashboards, player picker, tournament and league panels for users
Developed the frontend of a members-exclusive company portfolio website; enhanced UI and added localization
Collaborated with an agile team of developers and external management to ensure timely completion of sprint goals and successful deployment

title: Fullstack Developer
description: Extended the company-wide infrastructure by developing key features such as a blog section, user authentication and admin dashboards, and customer support, significantly increasing user traffic to the company homepage
Extended and optimised existing relational databases to support new functionalities, ensuring seamless data integration with API endpoints
Enhanced the existing system of web applications by implementing a microservices architecture with containerised and scalable applications
Managed and optimised the legacy company landing page with WordPress, by collaborating with management to add custom features, plugins, and optimise performances

title: Frontend Developer
description: Worked on the frontend of MindCleanse, a cross-platform mobile application focused on mental health coaching with Vue.js, Ionic, Tailwind, Typescript and Pinia
Collaborated with agile team in sprint meetings to conceptualize user stories, and develop features and functionalities based on customer requirements
Practiced pair programming to rapidly develop a client website called OneHandBall
Developed a video chat module for MindCleanse; also compatible with other company applications as a library

title: Fullstack Developer
description: Developed and deployed responsive, SEO-optimized web applications for small and medium-sized businesses
Successfully developed and deployed the official website for our university’s annual festival KIITFEST 2019
Developed a marketplace with responsive design for a local flower store to immensely boost sales revenue
Supported end-users by designing Figma prototypes, analysing feedbacks, fixing production issues and adding new features
Created and maintained technical documentation and user manuals for junior developers and end-users respectively
